entry.title: Why Chatica rejects Cloud Storage entirely
entry.summary: Sovereignty cannot be negotiated. Read our detailed critique of modern web apps and why central servers are an unnecessary single point of failure.
entry.content: Sovereignty cannot be negotiated. Read our detailed critique of modern web apps and why central servers are an unnecessary single point of failure. Chatica operates entirely peer-to-peer with no cloud dependencies.

entry.title: Onion Routing & Peer Discovery Mechanics
entry.summary: A deep dive into how CHATICA clients safely communicate over Tor networks without revealing routing tables or machine hardware fingerprints.
entry.content: A deep dive into how CHATICA clients safely communicate over Tor networks without revealing routing tables or machine hardware fingerprints. This architecture ensures complete anonymity at the protocol level.

entry.title: v1.0.4-beta – The Sovereign Release
entry.summary: Implemented full desktop rendering logic and offline localized keys configuration for the Sovereign Release.
entry.content: Implemented full desktop rendering logic & offline localized keys configuration. This release marks a major milestone in local-first sovereignty.
